items.headline: Live Updates: Knicks look to sweep 76ers
items.description: Follow Sunday's live blog as the Knicks hope to advance to the Eastern Conference Finals

items.headline: Washington Wizards win 2026 NBA Draft Lottery
items.description: The Washington Wizards win the 2026 NBA Draft Lottery and will pick No. 1 in the 2026 NBA Draft.

items.headline: James Harden’s late takeover fuels Cavaliers’ Game 3 win
items.description: James Harden answered the bell with 9 fourth quarter points in the Cavs’ Game 3 win.

items.headline: Ajay Mitchell is the Thunder’s latest emergent star after his best career playoff game vs. Lakers
items.description: With Jalen Williams still sidelined due to injury, Ajay Mitchell stepped up and provided a huge spark in the Thunder’s Game 3 win.

items.headline: Starting 5: Unbeaten OKC up 3-0, Harden closes for Cavs, Knicks can clinch today
items.description: Ajay Mitchell powers Thunder to 3-0 lead, Harden duels Cade to make it 2-1, New York goes for sweep, Wemby’s adjustments lead Spurs.

items.headline: Celtics' star Jayson Tatum buoyed in return by support from Mom
items.description: As Jayson Tatum returned from a torn Achilles tendon, his mother, Brandy Cole, provided an inspirational presence.

items.headline: 3 things to watch in Spurs-Timberwolves Game 4
items.description: After two straight trips to the West Finals, Minnesota sees the next round as its turf. But the rising Spurs stand in the way.

items.headline: 4 Takeaways: Thunder too deep, threatening to sweep Lakers
items.description: OKC's depth, defense and efficiency – combined with too many Lakers turnovers – resulted in a 3rd-straight double-digit victory.

items.headline: Reports: Steve Kerr returning to Warriors on 2-year deal
items.description: Steve Kerr has reportedly reached an agreement in principle on a two-year contract to continue coaching the Golden State Warriors.

items.headline: 3 things to watch in Knicks-76ers Game 4
items.description: The Knicks hold a 3-0 lead over the 76ers in the East semis, one win from their second straight trip to the conference finals.

items.headline: 4 Takeaways: Harden comes up clutch as Cavaliers pull to 2-1
items.description: Whether it was because of a more familiar atmosphere or a sense of urgency, Cavs had all the answers down the stretch of Game 3.

items.headline: Recap: Thunder stake 3-0 lead, Cavaliers pull one back
items.description: Check out the best from Saturday's action in the 2026 NBA Playoffs with our live blog, featuring Pistons-Cavs and Thunder-Lakers.

items.headline: Starting 5: Wemby invades Ant’s house, Knicks go up 3-0, top seeds tip off Game 3s today
items.description: Wemby and Edwards’ rare duel, Brunson & NY storm Philly, Jared McCain aides OKC, Pistons’ Bickerstaff crafts comeback culture.

items.headline: Denver’s playoff struggle didn’t cost David Adelman. The roster, though, could be wide open
items.description: The president of the Denver Nuggets says his faith in coach David Adelman remains strong despite the team's early playoff exit.

items.headline: Joel Embiid returns from sore ankle and hip, but he’s not enough for Sixers as Knicks go up 3-0
items.description: Joel Embiid is one loss away from an early offseason, despite returning from injuries to try and make the East semis competitive.
